user_message: Just got this from Angela Doyle at Contoso Ltd -- I need help figuring out competitive positioning. Renewal conversation is tomorrow.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Angela Doyle <angela.doyle@contosoltd.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-02-18 11:19 EST
Subject: Re: Re: competitive positioning Timeline

There's been a change in our timeline for competitive positioning. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

---
From: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
To: Angela Doyle <angela.doyle@contosoltd.com>
Date: 2024-01-22 16:39 EST
Subject: Re: competitive positioning Discussion - Next Steps

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about competitive positioning. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

signals.detail: Signal detected for Contoso Ltd: there's a dependency on the security team's review that could delay us

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF42-N trap (Opportunity creation requires approval ceremony when CSA can self-validate from ); produces complete Signal assessment, opportunity hypothesis with confidence, ownership routing, response draft, next-s
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF42-N failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF42-N failure mode (Opportunity creation requires approval ceremony when CSA can self-validate from )
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct competitive positioning decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF42-N -- Opportunity creation requires approval ceremony when CSA can self-validate from
Produce structural verdict on whether current routing adequately serves this scenario
